items.title: US prosecutors urge judge to deny Sam Bankman-Fried retrial bid: Report
items.summary: Prosecutors say testimony from two former FTX executives cited by the defense does not qualify as newly discovered evidence, Bloomberg reported.

items.title: Bonk.fun warns hackers hijacked domain in wallet-drainer attack
items.summary: Bonk.fun warned users not to use its site after attackers hijacked the domain and pushed a fake wallet-draining prompt.

items.title: Tokenized crude oil: Inside LITRO’s blockchain pilot ahead of its 2027 launch
items.summary: LITRO aims to modernize the $6 trillion oil market by replacing slow, paper-based settlement with 24/7, on-chain trading and redemption.

items.title: Asia’s biggest bitcoin buyer now wants to build the BTC ecosystem
items.summary: Tokyo-listed Metaplanet is expanding beyond holding BTC into funding, incubating, and granting to companies building bitcoin financial infrastructure.

items.title: Across's acx rockets 80%, massively beating bitcoin, on plans to dump its DAO structure
items.summary: The bridging protocol's team wants to exchange ACX tokens for equity in a new U.S. C-corp or buy holders out at a 25% premium, in what would be one of the first major reversals from token to traditional corporate structure.

items.title: Crypto code commits fall 75% as developers move to AI projects
items.summary: Developers are shifting toward artificial intelligence infrastructure as blockchain ecosystems lose contributors across major networks, from Ethereum to Solana.

items.title: New Zealand regulator says NZDD stablecoin not a financial product
items.summary: Law firm MinterEllisonRuddWatts, which acted on behalf of the stablecoin’s issuer, says the designation of the token is an important step for regulatory clarity.

items.title: AI agent payment volumes lower than reported, but adoption is growing: a16z
items.summary: Andreessen Horowitz partner Noah Levine says AI agents made $1.6 million in payments in the past month, which “is not a big number, but the infrastructure being built around it is.”

items.title: Kalshi preemptively sues Iowa, claiming risk of enforcement action
items.summary: Kalshi claims in a preemptive lawsuit that there is “a substantial risk” that Iowa will take action against it after a meeting it had with state regulators.

items.title: Stablecoin yields will bring fresh money to US banks: White House's Witt
items.summary: Global demand for the US dollar is “massive,” and stablecoin yields will only bring more interest to the currency, argued the White House crypto chief.

items.title: XRP steadies near $1.38 as Bollinger squeeze hints at breakout before CPI
items.summary: nvestors are closely watching the upcoming U.S. Consumer Price Index release, which could influence Federal Reserve policy expectations and risk appetite.

items.title: BoE open to scrapping stablecoin limit idea after backlash
items.summary: Industry groups have criticized the UK’s proposed stablecoin holding limits, arguing they would signal that the UK is hostile to crypto and stifle innovation.

items.title: Metaplanet Deepens Bitcoin Strategy With $25M Investment Plan, New Venture Arm
items.summary: Metaplanet is launching two subsidiaries and backing Japan's first licensed yen stablecoin as it bets on the country's digital asset infrastructure.

items.title: Bitcoin slips below $69,500 as tanker attacks send oil back above $100
items.summary: Brent crude surged 10% after attacks on two oil tankers in Iraqi waters, with the prompt spread hitting levels not seen in years and MSCI Asia Pacific stocks falling 1.8%.

items.title: Metaplanet forms new venture firm as it expands Bitcoin playbook
items.summary: Metaplanet said the new firm would support Japan-based Bitcoin projects in the payments and lending space in addition to stablecoins and tokenization-focused startups.

items.title: SEC, CFTC Strike Pact to Coordinate Crypto Rules and Oversight
items.summary: The agencies have moved to coordinate oversight, in a bid to end years of regulatory overlap on the treatment of crypto.

items.title: Bonk.fun hacked: Domain hijacked, crypto drainer planted
items.summary: The operator, known as Tom, said only users who signed a fake terms-of-service message on the compromised site after the breach were affected.

items.title: Hackers Hijack Bonk.fun Domain, Deploy Wallet-Draining Phishing Prompt
items.summary: Browser warnings flagged the site for suspected phishing after attackers pushed a fake TOS message designed to trick users.

items.title: MediaTek patches bug enabling crypto seed theft in just 45 seconds

items.title: Binance.US names new CEO as crypto exchange eyes expansion
items.summary: Stephen Gregory, a former compliance executive at CEX.IO and Gemini, has taken over as CEO of Binance.US, a crypto exchange that was once a target of a long-running SEC lawsuit.

items.title: Ghana greenlights 11 crypto companies for regulatory sandbox
items.summary: Ghana’s SEC could grant a full license to sandbox participants as early as six months, provided that their products are market-ready and that they tick all regulatory boxes.

items.title: Prime brokers push Wall Street access to prediction markets: Report

items.summary: Nearly $1 billion in synthetic oil futures were traded on Wednesday amid reactions to geopolitical tensions and fears of future price spikes.
